final.sql:
WITH category_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        i_category,
        AVG(i_current_price) AS avg_price
    FROM item
    GROUP BY i_category
),
filtered_items AS (
    SELECT 
        i_item_sk,
        i_category,
        i_current_price
    FROM item i
    JOIN category_avg ca ON i.i_category = ca.i_category
    WHERE i.i_current_price > 1.2 * ca.avg_price
),
sales_in_period AS (
    SELECT 
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        ss.ss_item_sk
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_da...
